case_title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES VS. BIN LI et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, BIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 100 FONT BLVD. 10-A, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94132, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LI, BIN
